title: Agent Interaction Mode Taxonomy
description: Interaction modes that affect federation visibility and A2A coordination for Hermes ASI

definitions.PERSONAL: Human-facing conversational mode, natural language, voice-driven. Default. Never renders A2A template fields.
definitions.ASK: Clarification gate before escalating to structured templates. Intercepted when task keywords detected in user message.
definitions.AGENTIC: Federation A2A coordination with full TO/FROM/CC/TASK/DELEGATION/WAY FORWARD/SEAL/TELEMETRY template. Only for cross-agent coordination, never in human replies.
